pub fn send(

        cfg: &AgentLoopConfig,
        transport: &dyn LoopTransport,
        registry: &ToolRegistry,
        tool_ctx: &ToolContext,
        sink: &dyn AuditSink,
        user_prompt: &str,
    ) -> Result<LoopOutcome, AgentLoopError> {
        AgentLoop::run(self, cfg, transport, registry, tool_ctx, sink, user_prompt)
    }

**Construction sites found:**

- `crates/orbit-core/src/command/tool.rs` — `execute_tool_command` builds `ToolContext { cwd, allowed_tools, agent_name, model_name, workspace_root: None, proc_allowed_programs, ..Default::default() }`
- `crates/orbit-core/src/runtime/pipeline.rs` — `run_tool_dry_run` builds `ToolContext { cwd: ..., ..Default::default() }`
- `crates/orbit-core/src/runtime/v2_host.rs` — `tool_context_for_activity` builds `ToolContext { cwd: ..., workspace_root: ..., policy_engine: ..., fs_profile: ..., fs_audit, orbit_host: ..., ..Default::default() }`

- `pipeline.rs`:`run_tool_with_role` — bare `ToolContext::default()` only, no field list
- All orbit-agent/src and orbit-engine/src files — receive or pass `ToolContext` but never construct a struct literal

- `crates/orbit-core/src/command/tool.rs`

- `crates/orbit-core/src/runtime/v2_host.rs`
